signInDescription: Enter your credentials to access your account
accountNotActivated: Your account is not activated. Please check your email for the activation link or contact support.
otpExpired: Code expired. Please log in again.
twoFactorDescription: Enter the verification code sent to your email
resendToast: A verification code has been sent to your email
accountLocked: Account locked due to multiple failed login attempts. Please contact administrator or reset your password.
setPasswordDescription: Choose a strong password to activate your account.
activateSuccessSubtitle: Your account has been successfully activated
activateSuccessAlertBody: Your account is now active. You can log in with your new password.
activateSuccessRedirect: Redirecting to login page in {{seconds}} seconds...
activateLinkInvalid: This activation link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new invitation.
activateLinkMissing: Invalid activation link. Please request a new invitation.
invitationExpiredSubtitle: The invitation link you received is no longer valid.
invitationExpiredBody: If you need a new invitation link, simply request one to be sent to {{email}}. The new link expires in 30 days.
newInvitationSent: Your administrator has been notified. They will resend your invitation shortly.
resetDescription: Enter your email address and we'll send you instructions to reset your password
resetEmailSentDescription: We've sent password reset instructions to {{email}}. Please check your inbox and follow the link to reset your password.
resetLinkExpiry: The reset link will expire in 1 hour. If you don't receive the email within a few minutes:
verifyEmailCorrect: Verify the email address is correct
setNewPasswordDescription: Create a strong password for your account
passwordsDoNotMatch: The passwords do not match. Please try entering them again.
resetSuccessAlertBody: Your password has been successfully reset. All active sessions have been terminated for security.
resetSuccessAlertLogin: You can now log in with your new password.
resetSuccessRedirect: Redirecting to login page in {{seconds}} seconds...
resetLinkInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
